baseline_1_naive_correlation.notes: Weak baseline - does not consider temporal order

baseline_2_zscore_temporal.notes: Medium baseline - uses z-score + first-to-change ordering

baseline_3_clustering_granger.notes: Strong baseline - uses clustering + Granger causality

minimum_passing.description: Must beat naive baseline for D grade

easy.notes: Single clear root cause, should get most of these correct

medium.notes: Longer cascades, some noise, requires better algorithms

hard.notes: Ambiguous cases, competing causes, hidden confounders

control.notes: Should NOT identify a root cause (false positive test)
